designNotes.aesthetic: A warm workshop editorial composition using cream, charcoal, rust, strong serif typography, mechanical circles, fine rules, and one complete numbered guidance list.
designNotes.signatureMove: A static spoke mark anchors the guidance image while the restrained staged entrance remains limited to the hero copy.
designNotes.rationale: The revision removes narrow viewport overflow, strengthens supporting type, compacts the ending, groups each section opening as one first thought, replaces the unrelated street image, and limits factual language to neutral guidance and the two confirmed clauses.
designNotes.shootDirection: Use warm natural morning light, tactile workshop and desert materials, restrained saturation, close editorial framing, one consistent normal lens character, and no identifiable people or business evidence.

imagePlan.alt: Contemporary still life inspired by bicycle repair shop
imagePlan.prompt: Contemporary editorial still life inspired by Bicycle repair shop with natural materials calm light no logos no signage and no business specific details

imagePlan.alt: Materials and colors arranged as a planning reference
imagePlan.prompt: Close editorial detail of materials and colors inspired by Bicycle repair shop with no logos no signage and no claimed business activity

imagePlan.alt: Warm desert commuter route detail in morning light
imagePlan.prompt: Contemporary editorial photograph of a quiet Tucson desert commuter route detail in warm natural morning light with tactile pavement sun faded walls native desert plants and a subtle bicycle wheel crop no people no logos no signage no identifiable address and no business specific activity using the same warm restrained color grade and lens character as the workshop still life
